prompt.text: Which word starts with the 'A' sound?
prompt.ttsText: Which word starts with the A sound?

feedback.correctMessage: Apple starts with the A sound!
feedback.incorrectMessage: Listen carefully! We're looking for the A sound at the start.

feedback.correctMessage: Cat and Hat both end in the '-at' sound!
feedback.incorrectMessage: Try again! Listen for the '-at' ending in cat.

prompt.text: Which ocean animal's name starts with the 'S' sound?
prompt.ttsText: Which ocean animal's name starts with the S sound?

feedback.correctMessage: Shark starts with the S sound!
feedback.incorrectMessage: Listen again! We're listening for the S sound at the start.

prompt.text: Listen to the sounds 'B'... 'A'... 'T'. What word do they make?
prompt.ttsText: Listen to the sounds: B... A... T. What word do they make?

feedback.incorrectMessage: Try again! Listen to each sound carefully: B... A... T...

prompt.text: Which word has the short 'E' vowel sound?
prompt.ttsText: Which word has the short E vowel sound?

feedback.correctMessage: Egg has the short E sound! Answer correctly twice to complete the challenge.
feedback.incorrectMessage: Not quite! Listen for the short 'eh' sound in egg.
